ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 10, 2003
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Plaintiff, West America Bank, representative: Alan Mayorgo presents with counsel, Michael Imfeld. Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1- Loan Package.----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Assignment of Lease--------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Personal Guaranty by Roy Muller-----ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4- Personal Guaranty by Vong------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5- Lease #1272------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 6- Assignment of Lease #1272 to West America Bank-----ID/EVID.
Exhibit 7- Guaranty-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 8- Guaranty-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants as follows:
Principal in the amount of $23,779.13
Interest in the amount of $6,048.93
Attorneys fees in the amount of $775.00
Costs in the amount of $368.00
Total judgment of $30,971.06
Judgment signed in open court. All exhibits stipulated to return to counsel.
